name: Gout - Elevated Urate Lab Query
description: Tests ability to find gout patients via elevated serum urate (>7 mg/dL = hyperuricemia threshold). First uric acid lab test. Includes Path D (asymptomatic hyperuricemia without formal gout dx).
prompt: Find patients with elevated serum urate (uric acid) results greater than 7 mg/dL.

prompts.naive: Find patients with high uric acid.
prompts.broad: Find patients with serum urate (uric acid) measurements above 7 mg/dL — the threshold for hyperuricemia and gout risk.
prompts.expert: Search Observation resources with LOINC 3084-1 (Urate in Serum) where value-quantity > 7 mg/dL. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|3084-1&value-quantity=gt7||mg/dL

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with elevated urate. Includes Path D (asymptomatic hyperuricemia).
